title: neotreleasea tumida
intro: Neotreleasea tumida, also known as Pilocarpus jardimii, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to Brazil. The medicinal properties of Neotreleasea tumida include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Neotreleasea tumida is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties.
